opt.answer: Top Linktree alternatives include LinkMAX (AI-powered, built-in CRM), Beacons (creator-focused), Koji (interactive), Taplink (analytics), and Stan Store (e-commerce). LinkMAX stands out with its AI page builder, lead management, and affordable pricing.

q1.answer: LinkMAX is an AI link in bio and mini-site builder that helps you put together one clear page for links, services, entries and applications.
q1.question: What is LinkMAX and what is it for?

q10.answer: Returns are possible within 14 days from the date of payment in accordance with the legislation of the Republic of Kazakhstan. More details in the user agreement.
q10.question: What are the refund conditions?

q11.answer: Yes. The gallery contains real pages from different niches: specialists, stores, services and creators.
q11.question: Can I see sample pages?

q12.answer: LinkMAX has AI page builder, CRM and notifications. Plus flexible blocks, clear tariffs and local languages.
q12.question: How is LinkMAX different from Linktree and Taplink?

q13.answer: Yes. You can add a catalog, price list, application forms and contact buttons so that the client can quickly place an order or record.
q13.question: Is LinkMAX suitable for a store or service?

q14.answer: Yes, custom domains and page branding are available in Pro.
q14.question: Can I connect my domain?

q2.answer: The basic plan is free forever. Pro: 3 months - 4,350в‚ё/month, 6 months - 3,698в‚ё/month (-15%), 12 months - 3,045в‚ё/month (-30%). Payment online, refund within 14 days.
q2.question: How much does it cost to use LinkMAX?

q3.answer: Choose a niche and write a few facts about yourself - AI will collect the structure, texts and CTA in a couple of minutes. The free plan has 1 generation/month, the Pro plan has 5 generations/month.
q3.question: How does AI page generation work?

q4.answer: 20+ types of blocks: profile, links, buttons, images, videos, carousels, products, price lists, forms, maps, messengers, reviews, FAQ, timers and more.
q4.question: What blocks are available for the page?

q5.answer: Yes. Pro has lead CRM and Telegram notifications. Analytics shows clicks, traffic sources and visitor behavior.
q5.question: Do you have CRM and analytics?

q6.answer: Yes. You can edit the page directly from your smartphone.
q6.question: Is the mobile editor supported?

q7.answer: Telegram for lead notifications and Google Calendar for scheduling. Social networks and instant messengers are available as blocks.
q7.question: What integrations does LinkMAX support?

q8.answer: No. 0% commission on your sales - you only pay for the subscription.
q8.question: Does LinkMAX take a commission on sales?

q9.answer: Payment by card and through available payment methods. You can also use tokens (100 tokens = 1 day Pro).
q9.question: How to pay for Pro subscription?

linkInBio.keywords: Keywords: links page, link in bio, link in bio, multilink, linktree alternative, taplink analogue, mini-landing
linkInBio.p1: Link-in-Bio (link in bio, multi-link) is a page that you place in the profile description of Instagram, TikTok, YouTube or Telegram. Instead of one link, you get a full-fledged mini-landing page with buttons, contacts and even a product catalog.
linkInBio.p2: LinkMAX.my is a modern alternative to Linktree and Taplink with AI content generation. You choose a niche (barber, photographer, trainer, psychologist), and artificial intelligence creates a ready-made page in 2 minutes: with a profile, the necessary blocks and texts.
linkInBio.p3: Unlike our competitors, we do not take a commission on your sales. All money from goods and services is yours. And built-in analytics and CRM help you understand which links work best.
linkInBio.subtitle: A links page is a mini-site that brings together all your resources: social networks, instant messengers, portfolio, products and services
linkInBio.title: What is Link-in-Bio and why is it needed?

items.question: What is LinkMAX and who is it for?
items.answer: LinkMAX is an operating system for micro-businesses. It is ideal for experts, freelancers, and small businesses who need a fast website, built-in CRM for requests, and simple analytics without complex settings.

items.question: Do I need to know programming?
items.answer: No, LinkMAX is a no-code platform. You build a site from ready-made blocks, like a Lego set. And the built-in AI assistant can write texts for you.

items.question: Can I accept payments in Tenge?
items.answer: Yes, the platform is fully adapted for the Kazakhstan market. You can specify prices in KZT, and integrations with local payment systems are in active development.

items.question: Does a site on LinkMAX help with Google promotion (SEO)?
items.answer: Absolutely. All pages on LinkMAX are automatically optimized for search engines: fast loading, adaptability for mobile devices, and correct semantic markup (Schema.org), which is critically important for SEO in 2025.

items.question: Is there a free plan?
items.answer: Yes, we have a forever free plan with basic features. You can create a page and start accepting requests without investment.

q1.answer: LinkMAX is a Micro-Business OS: an operating system for small businesses. Includes an AI page builder, built-in CRM for requests, Telegram notifications and analytics. Everything you need to start a business in one place.

q10.answer: Yes, in Pro. Instead of LinkMAX.my/name it will be yoursite.com.
q10.question: Can I have my domain?

q11.answer: Visa, Mastercard or Kaspi card. Payment in tenge.
q11.question: How to pay for Pro?

q12.answer: 14 days from payment. If it doesn't suit you, we'll return it without questions.
q12.question: Return conditions?

q2.answer: The basic plan is free forever. Pro - from 3,045 в‚ё/month when paid annually. 14 days for return.
q2.question: What is the price?

q3.answer: Choose a niche, write 2-3 sentences about yourself. AI selects the structure, writes texts, and arranges blocks. Then you edit.
q3.question: How does AI work?

q4.answer: 25+: profile, links, products, price, form, entry, reviews, FAQ, map, messengers, video, gallery and others.
q4.question: What are the blocks?

q5.answer: Yes, in Pro. All applications in one place, statuses, notes. Plus notifications in Telegram.
q5.question: Do you have a CRM for applications?

q6.answer: Yes. The editor works on the phone the same way as on the computer.
q6.question: Can I edit from my phone?

q7.answer: No. 0%. If you sell through the page, it's all yours.
q7.question: Do you take a commission on sales?

q8.answer: AI assembles the page. Built-in CRM. Notifications in Telegram. Prices in tenge. Interface in Russian.

q9.answer: Yes. Catalog, price, online registration. The client sees the products and prices and leaves a request.
